heading: Omitted
label: 995 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided that payments would not be subject to liens, debts, or claims except delinquent debts owed by the tribe to the United States or owed by individual Indians to the tribe or to the United States, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 87–775, § 576 Stat. 776Oct. 9, 1962
